package rulecoverage

func NegativeWideSelectQuery() string {
    ruleID := "wide_select_query"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Literal SELECT * query shapes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
